title: AI Image Generation Bridge v1
rootCause: The verified LRE prompt and PVE metadata were active, but production PNG bytes were still drawn by packages/storage/src/png.ts createMvpCrestPngBuffer(), a deterministic pixel-buffer renderer. The prompt was stored as metadata only.

openai.bridgeStatusNow: allowlisted LRE PNG artifacts can call OpenAI Images API when LRE_IMAGE_GENERATION_PROVIDER=openai and OPENAI_API_KEY are configured

newExecutionPath: fallback to deterministic renderer if unavailable or failed

fallbackBehavior.providerNotConfigured: uses deterministic renderer and records provider_not_configured
fallbackBehavior.providerFailure: uses deterministic renderer and records fallback_used=true with bridge_error
fallbackBehavior.transparentPng: kept on deterministic renderer for alpha-safe delivery

readinessConclusion: One allowlisted order can now generate real AI PNG artifacts if OpenAI image provider env vars are configured and PVE passes >=95. Without provider configuration, delivery remains safe through deterministic fallback.
